personal_info.name: Abhiram Singuru
personal_info.title: Oracle PL/SQL Developer
personal_info.hero_subtitle: Associate Software Engineer specializing in database systems, performance tuning, and automation processes. Leveraging Oracle PL/SQL, Unix shell scripting, and Java to deliver high-performing backend infrastructure.
personal_info.about_desc: I am a backend-focused engineer currently working as an Associate at Cognizant. My expertise revolves around optimizing large-scale databases, scripting automated monitoring checks, and helping enterprise applications migrate to modern web stacks.
about_bullets: Currently supporting **The Hartford Case Management** platform transition from legacy Oracle Forms to modern Java/Angular services.
Passionate about AWS Cloud operations, Database optimization (SQL tuning, indexing, explain plan), and Unix cronjob automation.
Oracle Database SQL Certified Associate and AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner.

certifications.title: Oracle Cloud OCI Generative AI Professional

experience.title: The Hartford Case Management 2.0
bullet_points: Supported the transition to a modern Java–Angular web application replacing a legacy Oracle Forms systems.
Analyzed Java microservices backend logs and REST APIs to debug and resolve data integration issues.
Utilized Dynatrace APM and Splunk query dashboards to perform real-time monitoring and log-based Root Cause Analysis (RCA).
Coordinated with core development teams for system hotfixes, patch deployments, and post-release database validation checks.
Upskilled in Java, Spring Boot, and microservices patterns to bridge the gap between database logic and frontend APIs.

experience.title: The Hartford - Case Management Legacy
bullet_points: Developed, optimized, and tuned complex Oracle PL/SQL procedures, packages, functions, and database triggers.
Managed legacy Oracle Forms enhancements and updated Unix shell scripting processes to support daily backend business workflows.
Investigated and resolved critical production database issues, delivering structural RCA and permanent software patches.
Collaborated with client business stakeholders to gather requirements, write functional specs, and recommend technical implementations.
Supervised month-end financial reconciliations and validations to ensure absolute data consistency in reporting systems.
Automated daily intake operations and processes to decrease manual effort and human error.
Mentored and guided junior engineers on Oracle workflows, performance tuning methods, and production support guidelines.

projects.title: PL/SQL Query Profiler & Index Optimizer
projects.description: An automated tuning script utility that parses TKPROF files and SQL Trace reports, automatically highlighting queries exceeding response thresholds. Recommends specific index strategies, partition splits, and hint overrides to optimize explain plans.

projects.title: Automated Shell System Reconciler
projects.description: A Unix bash-agent utility running on cron/Autosys scheduler that executes cross-database validation checks. Pulls transaction volumes from legacy tables, validates figures against financial staging schemas, and sends automated alert logs to support dashboards on discrepancy.

projects.title: Case Intake Automation Service
projects.description: A backend service designed to process intake requests from web applications. Intercepts structured Angular forms, executes validations via Spring Boot API layers, and persists data into Oracle database tables using transactional triggers.

projects.title: OCI Generative AI SQL Companion
projects.description: A productivity CLI utility leveraging OCI Generative AI SDK models to generate boilerplate PL/SQL script files. Takes normal language inputs describing tables and desired outputs and drafts optimized stored procedures, exception blocks, and tests.

writing.title: Mastering Explain Plans: Tuning Slow SQL Queries in Oracle 19c
writing.description: A deep-dive tutorial explaining how to generate, read, and analyze Oracle Explain Plans. Covers key table scans vs index lookups, identifying join order issues, and implementing SQL hints to force optimal optimizer behavior.

writing.title: Automating Production Support: How Unix Shell Scripting Saved Us 5 Hours Weekly
writing.description: Walkthrough of a shell agent built to perform automated system health check tasks. Highlights trapping exit statuses, piping database credentials securely, and setting up centralized email logs for support operations.

writing.title: Transitioning to Cloud: An Oracle Developer's Guide to AWS CCP
writing.description: My journey preparing for and passing the AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner exam. Examines the conceptual differences between hosting on-prem Oracle DB clusters vs launching AWS RDS instances and VPC isolation.

items: **TOAD (Tool for Oracle Application Developers):** My primary client for writing PL/SQL packages, running explain plans, and managing Oracle database schemas.
**VS Code (Visual Studio Code):** For writing shell scripts, python helper files, and Java backend classes. Loaded with GitLens and SQL formatter extensions.
**WinSCP / Cyberduck:** Essential clients for transferring scripts, log files, and automation triggers to Unix staging/production support environments.
**Database Schema:** Oracle 19c Database systems, hosting transactional tables and complex data partitions.
**Shell & Scripting:** Unix Shell (KornShell / Bash) with native cron daemons for batch-scheduling automation.
**Scheduling:** CA Autosys Workload Automation to coordinate file processing and database procedure timelines.
**AWS Cloud Services:** Working with RDS (Relational Database Service), EC2 instances, and IAM configuration roles.
**Logs & Analytics:** Splunk query syntax for looking up server error outputs, tracking Java transaction speeds.
**Performance Monitoring:** Dynatrace APM dashboarding to monitor host metrics, heap sizes, and API request latency spikes.
**Machine:** MacBook Air (M-Series) — compact, quiet, and powerful enough for database modeling and local scripting.
**Terminal:** Warp Terminal (GPU-accelerated shell with integrated AI command suggestions).
